title: Senior Instructional Designer at Arena Animation

jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Arena Animation
jsonLd.description:
Arena Animation, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Arena Animation:
Arena Animation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arena Animation!
